title: jatropha zeyheri
intro: Jatropha zeyheri, also known as the Zeyher's bush or stink bush, is a shrub or small tree native to the subtropical regions of southern Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, as well as its ability to inhibit the growth of certain pathogens. The health benefits of Jatropha zeyheri include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, with its extracts and herbal preparations believed to have antiseptic and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Jatropha zeyheri can be found in traditional medicine and are often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications.
